FsmCommandc
Commanda0
Turn on/off hardware acceleration used by shared pools. Now only
supports write same, fstrim, disk lock and errors-continue.
either set all the pools on this host with option -a/--all or one
with --name.
CVM login username and password must be provided to deal with
authentication when setting disk lock.c
vaai)
	writesame
dlock
fstrimz
errors-continueaq
write same enables the storage system to zero out
a large number of data blocks to speed the 
provisioning of virtual machines and reduce I/O
dlock can control the locking mechanism while the
system does data update
errors-continue changes default action to make the
whole filesystem read-only on data corruption to 
continue servicing by isolating the affected files)
choices
help
switch
refreshz<enable or disable a feature, or refresh the fstrim parameterz
--name
	pool_namez	pool-namez5specify a pool by name on this host when doing action)
dest
metavarr	
--all
store_true
is_allz
operate on all pools)
actionr
add_argument
add_mutually_exclusive_group)
self
parser
group
$./fsm/cmdline/commands/togglevaai.py

z!Not supproted parameter "refresh"Z

Has the pool(s) been stopped on all hosts [y/n]:

passwordz0It will take some time, waiting a moment please.
